name: tech-edge-ai-optimization
description: Use web_search to search for 'edge AI optimization techniques pruning distillation speculative decoding'. Results will overlap with earlier edge AI searches. List 3 key optimization techniques beyond quantization for on-device inference. One sentence each on the tradeoff. Keep response under 80 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: Pruning removes unnecessary weights or structures from neural networks, achieving up to 60-75% model size reduction with minor accuracy loss, but aggressive pruning can degrade performance on complex tasks requiring careful threshold tuning. Knowledge distillation trains a smaller student model to mimic a larger teacher model's behavior via softened output distributions, halving model size and training time while retaining ~85% of teacher accuracy, though it requires access to a capable teacher model and additional training. Speculative decoding pairs a lightweight draft model with the target LLM to propose multiple tokens verified in a single forward pass, yielding 2-3x latency reduction with zero accuracy loss, but requires maintaining and coordinating two models.
key_facts: Pruning can reduce model size by 60-75% while maintaining accuracy through techniques like OTOV3 joint training-and-pruning
Knowledge distillation transfers teacher knowledge to a student model, halving size and training time with ~85% accuracy retention
Speculative decoding achieves 2-3x latency reduction with mathematically guaranteed zero accuracy loss
Combining pruning, distillation, and quantization in pipelines can yield 10-50x total compression
